name: Chocolate Bear Parade
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Place sheets of foil on the countertop for cooling cookies.
2. In a large bowl, combine brown sugar, shortening, water, and vanilla. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs and beat into the creamed mixture.
3. In another bowl, mix together flour, cocoa, baking soda, and salt. Stir this mixture into the creamed mixture on low speed just until combined. Stir in chocolate chips.
4. Using a rounded measuring tablespoon (15 mL), drop dough about 2 inches (5 cm) apart onto an ungreased baking sheet. Smooth the tops of the cookies with the back of a teaspoon. Press miniature bear cookies around the edge of each cookie, arms touching.
5. Bake one baking sheet at a time in the oven for 7 to 9 minutes, or until the cookies are set. Do not overbake. Let cool on the baking sheet for 2 minutes before removing and allowing to cool completely.
Makes: About 3 dozen cookies
